automation_packs.summary: Reference automation pack demonstrating commands, argv validation, and on-disk artifact checks for CI and local tooling.

authentication_model.summary: GovAI integrations use bearer tokens (GOVAI_API_KEY) against the audit HTTP API, optional X-GovAI-Project metadata, and operator-managed API keys. MCP and IDE bridges read local config only; secrets never ship in manifests.

ci_cd_model.summary: Repository Makefile targets and GitHub Actions emit deterministic JSON and Markdown artifacts. Developer integrations checks aggregate diagnostics, manifest validation, automation pack validation, and summary generation before the documentation gate.

developer_workflows: Clone from staging, run python venv setup under python/, start docker compose for local audit, use make developer-integrations-platform-check before PR.
Run examples/integrations shell drivers to reproduce validators without memorizing argv.
Use docs/integrations/github-actions.md for CI wiring and docs/integrations/cli-workflows.md for govai CLI patterns.

integration_program.summary: Developer integrations and automation platform: machine-readable manifest, automation packs, validators, diagnostics, documentation, and CI artifacts for GovAI adoption without changing runtime enforcement.

local_tooling.summary: Stdlib Python scripts under scripts/ validate manifests and packs; Makefile exposes developer-integrations, manifest validation, automation-pack targets, and developer-integrations-platform-check. No network calls in validators.

non_goals: No hosted billing or ledger mutations from these validators.
No automatic execution of automation pack commands during validation (structure and artifact paths only).
No certification or legal compliance claims from documentation or manifests.

supported_integrations.summary: Primary integration via OpenAPI v1: POST /evidence, GET /compliance-summary, exports and health endpoints.
In-repo GovAIClient and govai CLI under python/ for typed HTTP and CI gates.
Workflow steps invoking Makefile targets and stdlib validators with JSON artifacts uploaded to CI.
Local MCP bridge and Cursor plugin pack for agent-assisted development against the same gates.
